summary.notes: No verdict is final approval; passing rows remain pending final approval QA.
summary.review_basis: standard_source_table enriched row, standard_semantic_shape_judge_queue semantic brief, S-101 refs where present, Aqua Map refs where present, OpenCPN day render where available, Helm candidate SVG/day render
top_repair_themes: multi-band colour sequences collapsed to two bands, especially cardinal and lateral rows
wrong pattern orientation for vertical stripe or checkered rows
generic buoy body substituted for distinct default, installation, isolated-danger, safe-water, or mooring reference silhouettes
a small number of local OpenCPN renders are missing and should be regenerated before promotion

verdicts.expected: conical buoy,cardinal-north-by,full-chart. Required conical/nun buoy body; black-yellow.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass for first-pass semantic visual parity against the enriched semantic brief and available provider references. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders the conical/nun buoy with black over yellow, matching the north-cardinal colour order; styling is cleaner/larger than OpenCPN but the class and order read correctly.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required before final approval QA; keep pending final approval.
